description: Machine-readable registry of prompt-engineering frameworks. Each entry is a data-only scaffold (id/name/template/required_slots/output_contract_default) that a slot renderer interpolates against a fixture. Replaces per-rig render() closures so adding a framework is a manifest entry, not new code. Shared slots: {{task}} the work statement; {{signature}} the target function signature; {{constraints}} the framework-neutral guardrail line; {{output_contract}} the framework-neutral return contract.

frameworks.name: RCAF
frameworks.output_contract_default: Return ONLY the JavaScript function source for `{{fn_name}}` (signature `{{signature}}`). No prose, no explanation, no test code, no markdown fence — just the function.

frameworks.name: RACE
frameworks.output_contract_default: Return ONLY the JavaScript function source for `{{fn_name}}` (signature `{{signature}}`). No prose, no explanation, no test code, no markdown fence — just the function.

frameworks.name: CIDI
frameworks.output_contract_default: Return ONLY the JavaScript function source for `{{fn_name}}` (signature `{{signature}}`). No prose, no explanation, no test code, no markdown fence — just the function.

frameworks.name: TIDD-EC
frameworks.long: Task / Instructions / Do's / Don'ts / Examples / Context
frameworks.template:
## Task
{{task}}

## Instructions
1. Implement `{{fn_name}}` to satisfy every acceptance criterion.
2. {{output_contract}}

## Do's
- Handle every stated edge case exactly.
- Keep it a single pure function with no side effects.
- Return only the function source.

## Don'ts
- Do not add extra parameters, helper globals, or behaviour beyond the spec.
- Do not include prose, explanations, tests, or a markdown fence.
- Do not rename the function or change its signature.

## Examples
Output shape: the bare function declaration `{{signature}} { ... }` and nothing else.

## Context
Pure-function implementation task evaluated by an automated assertion suite that calls the function directly.
frameworks.output_contract_default: Return ONLY the JavaScript function source for `{{fn_name}}` (signature `{{signature}}`). No prose, no explanation, no test code, no markdown fence — just the function.

frameworks.name: COSTAR
frameworks.long: Context / Objective / Style / Tone / Audience / Response
frameworks.template:
## Context
Pure-function JavaScript implementation task. {{constraints}}

## Objective
{{task}}

## Style
Precise, implementation-grade. No preamble.

## Tone
Direct and technical.

## Audience
An automated assertion suite that calls the function directly and rejects out-of-scope behaviour or invented parameters.

## Response
{{output_contract}}
frameworks.output_contract_default: Return ONLY the JavaScript function source for `{{fn_name}}` (signature `{{signature}}`). No prose, no explanation, no test code, no markdown fence — just the function.
